category_sources: Official TrailDB docs define it as a tool for storing and querying series of events.
source_facts.description calls TrailDB a database for log-structured data.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to TrailDB Docs.
TrailDB Docs are hosted under the official traildb.io domain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/traildb/traildb; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs describe storing/querying event series and mention the C library and multiple bindings.
source_facts.description says it is for log-structured data.
